title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
